steps: Contact Citigroup Australia to request correction of withholding tax from 25% to 15% under AU-NO treaty for BHP dividend on CLIENT02 account 1301234567
Provide documentation proving Norwegian tax residency and treaty eligibility for reduced 15% rate on AUD 1,387,500 gross dividend
Submit formal reclaim request for AUD 138,750 excess withholding tax with reference to Australia-Norway Double Tax Agreement Article 10
If custodian cannot process correction, file direct reclaim with Australian Taxation Office for treaty rate differential

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
